## Q4 Revenue Report Summary

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| **Total Revenue** | $24.8M |
| **EBITDA** | $8.2M |
| **Net Income** | $5.1M |
| **Customer Churn** | 4.2% |

**Key Highlights:**
- Strong Q4 performance with $24.8M in total revenue
- Healthy profit margins with $8.2M EBITDA (33% margin) and $5.1M net income
- Customer retention performing well with only 4.2% churn rate

## Q4 Revenue Summary

**Financial Performance:**
- **Total Revenue:** $24.8M
- **EBITDA:** $8.2M (33% margin)
- **Net Income:** $5.1M (21% margin)

**Customer Metrics:**

The quarter shows strong profitability with healthy margins, though the 4.2% churn rate may warrant attention depending on industry benchmarks.
